# Yanina Chizhevskaya — AI Product Manager

> Personal portfolio and services page of Yanina Chizhevskaya — AI Product Manager and Vibe Coder building subscription AI applications for health, wellness, and longevity companies. Based in Kazan, Russia. Working with clients in Russia, UK, and US.

## Who

Янина Чижевская (Yanina Chizhevskaya) — AI Product Manager with 10 years of product and project management experience. Specializes in launching AI products from concept to production using vibe coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Lovable). Has 4+ AI products live in production and 1 year of experience at the international MindBodyFace platform (US/UK/EU face fitness).

Education: Tomsk State University (Product Manager in IT), Kuzbass State Technical University (engineer).

## Services

The site offers a "ladder" of services from free to premium:

1. **Free AI Audit (5 days)** — strategic 60-min call + AI app concept for client's audience + 12-month unit economics + 90-day roadmap + check-list "10 mistakes when launching an AI app". Total value: 240,000 RUB. Price: 0 RUB. For first 3 projects per month.

2. **AI Concept Sprint (14 days)** — full product audit + UX flow + clickable prototype in Lovable + 5 CustDev interviews + unit economics + investor presentation + video demo + technical specification + brand direction. Total value: 570,000 RUB. Price: 79,000 RUB. Guarantee: 100% money back if not clear.

3. **AI Product Launch (6 weeks)** — full design system + frontend + backend + AI integration (Claude/GPT/Gemini with fallback) + billing (Telegram Stars / YooKassa) + analytics + deploy + 30 days support + marketing package. Total value: 1,130,000 RUB. Price: from 500,000 RUB. Guarantee: launch in 6 weeks or 10% discount per delay week.

4. **AI Implementation in Companies** — AI audit, roadmap, internal vibe coding tools, training team. From 80,000 RUB for audit, 300,000 RUB for roadmap + 2 months support.

5. **Revenue Share Partnership** — 0 RUB upfront + 20-30% MRR for year 1. For brands with 50,000+ audience in health/wellness/longevity niche. Takes 2 partners per year.

## Cases (live AI products)

- **Periya / Перия (@PeriyaApp_bot, periya.pro)** — wellness Telegram Mini App for women 35+: personalized nutrition and training plans with cycle-adaptive logic, AI photo calorie estimation. React 19 + Node + Prisma + PostgreSQL + Claude API. In production.

- **MindBodyFace (mindbodyface.com)** — international face fitness, facial massage, natural facial rejuvenation platform and mobile app. US/UK/EU market. 2024-2025.

- **BreathFlow (@BreathFlowAI_bot)** — Telegram Mini App for breathing practices: 4 techniques (Wim Hof, 4-4-4-4, 4-7-8, Buteyko), Web Audio API with binaural beats, Telegram CloudStorage. In production.

- **Biogenom** — MVP of nutrition mobile app, B2C/B2B2C, 2022-2023.

- **Lookbook AI (look-ai.ru / room.look-ai.ru)** — AI stylist and virtual try-on, dual-provider AI architecture (Claude + Gemini). In testing.

- **Corporate AI agents** — neurocopywriter, GPTs sales bot, support chat bot in international company. Reduced department FOT by 50%, reduced onboarding time by 30%.

## Stack

- AI: Claude Code, Cursor, Lovable, Google AI Studio, Gemini API, Claude API, OpenAI GPTs, NotebookLM, MCP servers, N8N
- Frontend: React + TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind, shadcn/ui
- Backend: Node + Express, Prisma + PostgreSQL, Supabase
- Deploy: Vercel, Timeweb VPS
- Apps: Telegram Mini Apps, Telegram Stars, YooKassa
- Analytics: Yandex Metrika, Google Analytics 4, PostHog, Amplitude, Mixpanel
- Design: Figma, Figma MCP
- Other: Python + FFmpeg, Playwright

## Target audience

- Health, wellness, longevity bloggers and experts (audience 50,000+)
- Online schools in nutrition, fitness, psychology
- FemTech and women's health startups
- Clinics and medical businesses
- Companies wanting to implement AI internally

## Pages

- [Home](https://chizhevskaya.pro/) — main portfolio, services, cases, lead magnet form
- [Services](https://chizhevskaya.pro/services) — AI product development, white-label Mini Apps, product audits and business automation
- [Каталог Mini Apps под брендом эксперта](https://chizhevskaya.pro/services/mini-apps-for-bloggers) — интерактивный каталог из 47 концепций white-label приложений для экспертов, врачей, клиник, нутрициологов, фитнес-тренеров, реабилитологов, гинекологов, психологов, коучей и онлайн-школ. Первый запуск — одно приложение под одну задачу и основной канал; второе или третье приложение оплачивается отдельно. AI-функции встраиваются внутрь выбранного приложения, а Web SaaS на собственном домене является более дорогим дополнительным форматом. Визуалы на странице обозначены как примеры интерфейса, а не как готовые продукты.
- [Products](https://chizhevskaya.pro/products) — own Mini Apps and AI products including Periya and BreathFlow
- [Partnerships](https://chizhevskaya.pro/partnerships) — white-label and revenue-share launch models for bloggers and experts
- [Cases](https://chizhevskaya.pro/cases) — client and product-management cases in SaaS, wellness, HealthTech and corporate AI
- [Blog](https://chizhevskaya.pro/blog) — practical articles about AI products, Mini Apps, subscription economics and HealthTech product analytics
- [About](https://chizhevskaya.pro/about) — Yanina Chizhevskaya's experience, specialization and product-development approach
- [Contact](https://chizhevskaya.pro/contact) — Telegram, VK, MAX and email contact options
- [Resume](https://chizhevskaya.pro/resume.html) — detailed work history (HTML/PDF)
